name: darkanchor nginz agent
description: Agent card for the darkanchor nginz product family. Native nginx modules, scripted policy, and AI gateway control — all running on stock nginx with no fork, no patch, no second runtime.

skills.name: Product Information
skills.description: Explains the nginz product family: nginz (26 native modules for stock nginx), nginz-njs (13 scripted policy modules), and nginz-token (AI gateway). Covers licensing, capabilities, and use cases.

skills.name: Documentation Reference
skills.description: Lists and describes all native and scripted modules with links to documentation pages covering use cases, config examples, and integration guidance.

skills.name: Contact
skills.description: Submit inquiries via POST /api/contact or /api/agent. Both endpoints require at least one reply method: email, reply_url (HTTPS webhook), or chat_id (Telegram bot). The operator will respond through the provided channel.
